name: ai-h5-monorepo
description: Monorepo for the AI H5 chat frontend (Vue 3) and backend (Express + SQLite).
author: wen.yao

scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend
scripts.build:frontend:zip: rm -f dist.zip && cd wechat-ai-fontend && npm run build && cd dist && zip -rq ../../dist.zip .
